hero.pill_free: Free to download. Pro unlocks the full kit.
hero.pill_adfree: No ads. No trackers. Your dirt stays yours.
hero.pill_founder: Founder's Lifetime · first 1,000 detectorists · drops at launch
hero.title_line1: Never walk the same patch twice.
hero.subtitle: Track your sessions. Log your finds. Manage your permissions. Back it all up to your own Google Drive. One app, built by a detectorist for detectorists.
hero.price_anchor: $0 to start. $19.99/year for the full kit. 7-day free trial.
mapcompare.label: Drag the slider
mapcompare.description: An 1890 surveyor's hand drew that homestead. The satellite forgot it. The USGS Historical Topo overlay puts it back on your dig map — pin-locatable, opacity-tunable, and ready when you are. Drag the slider and see where the old roads, schools, and farmsteads used to sit.
howitworks.label: A week with SweepTrack
howitworks.description: Three rituals every detectorist already runs in their head. The app just puts them in your pocket.
howitworks.step1_description: Pull up the USGS Historical Topo overlay. There's a homestead the satellite forgot. Soil moisture's at 0.42, wind's down, the Detecting Score reads 84 — verdict: GO. Draft the permission letter from the Vault, drop offline tiles for the area, set the calendar reminder. Bed.
howitworks.step2_description: GPS locked, tactical HUD up, 8 fields one tap away. Perimeter Guard buzzes the second you near the hedge line. Hot signal — quick-drop a pin, snap a photo, log the depth on the 0–40 cm slider, voice-note the VDI and the soil. Three hours in, battery's still at 80%.
howitworks.step3_description: Overlay this week's track on last month's. Three strips you never covered. Stats screen says 14 finds, treasure rate up 8%, all the keepers came after Tuesday's rain. One tap and the lot's backed up to your own Google Drive. Mark next Saturday on the calendar.
features.label: Features
features.description: Every screen exists because a detectorist needed it on a real session. Nothing here is filler.
features.gps_description: See exactly where you've swung and where you haven't. Real-time satellite view with distance, speed, heading, and altitude — so the same hammered patch never gets two passes.
features.heatmap_description: Stop guessing which patches you missed. The rainbow density overlay turns your track into a heat map — green means walked, red means hammered, the gaps tell you where to swing next.
features.oldmap_description: Find where the old homesteads, roads, and schools used to sit. Genuine USGS historical topographic tiles layered onto your modern satellite, with an opacity slider so you can blend old over new.
features.presets_description: Running a Deus II? Equinox 800? Simplex+? Load your machine in one tap — 60+ models across 12 brands, each card in its real brand color, plus a Custom slot you build yourself.
features.offline_description: No signal in the field? Download tile packs before you drive. Four sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, USGS Historical Topo. Pan to the area, pick the source, hit download. Done.
features.perimeter_description: Draw your permission boundary on the map. The phone tells you which of four stages you're in — Approaching, Near, At edge, Outside — without you ever looking at the screen.
features.analytics_description: Sessions, finds-per-session, active days, treasure rate. Top sessions ranked. Top locations clustered. Weather insight that learns which soil moisture you find on. Your detecting career, in numbers.
features.export_description: Take your data anywhere. Export sessions as GPX, KML, CSV, or full SweepTrack JSON — open in Google Earth, send to a buddy, archive to your PC, or move to a new phone.
features.weather_description: Don't waste a trip. Soil moisture, wind, temperature, humidity, precip — folded into a 0–100 Detecting Score with a verdict: GO, CAUTION, or WAIT. Any location, any day up to a week ahead.
features.sites_description: Old churches, battlefields, mills, ferries, every Wikipedia landmark within range. Two sources (OpenStreetMap + Wikipedia), one map, distance and bearing on every pin.
features.compare_description: Stack 2 to 5 past sessions on top of each other and watch the gaps surface. Overlay mode with a blend slider, or split / grid side-by-side. The strips you missed light up.
features.backup_description: Phone dies? New device? One-tap backup pushes every session, find, preset, and permission to your own Google Drive. Restore on any Android. Never see a 'lost data' screen again.
faq.label: Real questions, straight answers
faq.q1: How does the Permission Vault actually stop me trespassing?
faq.a1: Every permission gets an entry: landowner, contact, status (Approved / Ask First / Denied), permit dates, and the exact site boundary drawn on a satellite map. The Vault flags entries that are expiring within 14 days, drops the permit date into your Google Calendar with one tap, and pairs the boundary to Perimeter Guard so your phone buzzes through four stages — Approaching, Near, At edge, Outside — before you ever cross a line. Need to ask in writing? The Vault generates a Request letter (and a Thank-You for after the dig) as a signature-ready PDF with your boundary attached as Exhibit A.
faq.q2: How do historical maps help me find better spots?
faq.a2: The app overlays genuine USGS historical topographic tiles onto your modern satellite view. Old homesteads, schools, churches, ferry crossings, demolished mills — every place people gathered and dropped things, none of which show on Google Maps. Slide the opacity to blend old over new, drop a pin on a vanished farmstead, walk straight to it. Coverage is strongest across the United States.
faq.q3: What does the Detecting Forecast actually measure?
faq.a3: It pulls live weather and folds soil moisture, wind, temperature, humidity, and precipitation into a 0–100 Detecting Score. The score gets a band — Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor, Bad — and a verdict: GO, CAUTION, or WAIT. Soil moisture above 0.3 = strong signals; below 0.1 = the dirt's bone-dry. You can check any spot anywhere up to a week out, and the screen drops contextual tips so you know exactly why it's a green light or why you'd waste the trip.
faq.q4: How do I know if I've already covered an area?
faq.a4: Three ways. The coverage Heatmap turns your live track into a rainbow density overlay — green = lightly walked, red = hammered, blank = you missed it. Track Overlay lets you load past sessions on top of the current map (six cycling colors so neighbouring tracks don't blur) and instantly see which strips you skipped. Session Comparison lets you stack 2–5 past visits and watch the gaps surface in overlay or split / grid mode.
faq.q5: What does the Measure tool do?
faq.a5: Tap the map to drop points along a line, tap point 1 again to close it into a polygon. Distance per segment, total perimeter, total area in hectares or acres — all calculated with real spherical geometry. Drag vertices to edit, tap a segment to insert a new point, undo without leaving the map. Save the shape to the Library (reverse-geocoded place name, no manual labels), or convert it to a Perimeter Guard with one tap so the polygon you just measured becomes the haptic fence you walk inside.
faq.a6: Hot signal? Quick-drop pins your spot in one tap. When you've got a moment, open the find: pick one of six types (Treasure, Gold, Coin, Relic, Jewelry, Trash), set the depth on a 0–40 cm slider, log VDI, signal strength, and one of seven soil types. Snap a photo, record a 15-second video, talk into an audio note. Add name, value, weight, notes if you want — all optional. Everything's editable later from the find detail screen. Pins on the map are color-coded by type so a glance tells you what you've already pulled.
faq.q7: Does the app support my specific detector?
faq.a7: Two answers. First, the app is a GPS tracker and field toolkit — it doesn't physically connect to your machine, so it works alongside any detector. Second, the preset library covers 60+ models across 12 brands: Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus. Each card shows in its real brand color so spotting your machine is instant. If your detector isn't on the list, the Custom slot lets you build a preset by hand and share it with your buddies via QR code or JSON file. One scan, settings transferred, no typos.
faq.q8: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
faq.a8: Free is not a teaser. GPS tracking on all 4 map types, 10 sessions, 5 finds, 1 detector preset, 2 vault entries, 3 of the 12 themes (Tactical, Amber, Cobalt), the compass, the ruler, the back-to-start line, the on-screen HUD. Enough to run a Saturday and decide if this is your app. Pro is for the detectorist who's serious about getting back to a productive site: unlimited sessions, finds, presets, and vault entries; Measure tool, Track Overlay, Heatmap, Session Comparison and Merging, Perimeter Guard, USGS Historical Overlay, offline tile downloads, Detecting Forecast, NOAA Tide Tables, Cloud Backup, Night Vision, Coin Caliper, all 12 themes, and full GPX/KML/CSV/JSON export. $19.99/year or $2.99/month, with a 7-day free trial. Cancel in one tap.
faq.q9: Does it work when I have no cell service?
faq.a9: Yes. GPS tracking is hardware-only — zero internet needed. Pre-download tile packs in any of 4 sources (Street, Satellite, Terrain, USGS Historical Topo) for the area you're driving to and the map renders without bars. The only features that need a connection are the Detecting Forecast, NOAA tides, and the Wikipedia / OpenStreetMap nearby-sites lookup, and you can hit those before you leave the house.
faq.q10: Is my detecting data private and safe?
faq.a10: All data lives on your phone in a local Room database. No analytics. No ads. No third-party SDKs siphoning your finds. The optional Google Drive backup is your Drive — we never see it, we never touch it, we don't even have an account that could read it. Export your full history as GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON anytime. You own everything; you can delete everything in two taps from Settings.
faq.a11: GPS tracking is the heaviest part. Expect roughly 10–15% per hour on a modern Android — about the same as Google Maps in navigation mode. Bring a power bank for an all-day dig and you're fine. The app also detects if your Xiaomi, Samsung, OnePlus, or other aggressive-OEM phone is about to kill background tracking and walks you through the exact battery setting to flip — otherwise long sessions get silently terminated within 30 minutes and that's a problem we'd rather not let happen to you.
faq.q12: I'm new to detecting. Will this make sense?
faq.a12: Yes. The 5-screen onboarding tutorial walks you through Welcome → Detect Smarter → Your Territory → Field Arsenal → Go Premium in under two minutes. Free tier is generous enough to learn on, and the in-app tutorials keep teaching as you swing. The Guides page on this site has 30+ articles covering everything from your first session to permission letter etiquette to reading the Detecting Forecast. New detectorist or veteran — same app, same depth.
faq.q13: Why isn't there an iPhone version?
faq.a13: Because Lorand only had one phone and it was Android. We hear you. iPhone isn't on the roadmap with a date yet, but it's not off the table forever. Drop your email on the waitlist and you'll hear about it the day it ships.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.description: Use the core forever for nothing. Pro unlocks every tool, every overlay, every map. Or lock in Founder's Lifetime if you're one of the first 1,000 through the door.
pricing.founder_sub: One-time purchase · yours forever · exclusive Founder badge in-app.
pricing.founder_description: Drops the moment we launch on Google Play. Limited to the first 1,000 detectorists. Get on the waitlist and we'll send you the link the second it goes live.
pricing.free_description: GPS tracking, 10 sessions, 5 finds, 1 preset, 2 vault entries, the compass, the ruler, the back-to-start line, the HUD. Enough to run a Saturday and decide if this is your app.
pricing.pro_sublabel: Or $2.99/mo · 7-day free trial · cancel in one tap.
pricing.pro_description: For the detectorist who's serious about getting back to a productive site. Unlimited sessions, finds, presets, vault entries. Heatmap, perimeter guard, USGS overlay, offline packs, forecast, tides, cloud backup — the lot.

footer.description: The metal-detecting kit that lives on your phone. GPS tracking, USGS overlays, perimeter guard, permission vault, detecting forecast, cloud backup, and a lot more we can't squeeze into this footer.

blog.cta_beginners: More guides coming regularly. New to detecting? Start with

comingsoon.duplicate: Already on the list — you're set.
comingsoon.error: Something went wrong — tap to retry
foundernote.quote: I'm a detectorist who learned to code. Every other app I tried was really a hiking tracker — none of them remembered where I walked last weekend, none knew what a VDI was, none generated a permission letter. So I built one that did.
showcase.label: Why detectorists keep it on the home screen
showcase.description: Built by a detectorist who got tired of generic GPS apps pretending to know what a productive site looks like. No fluff. No filler.
showcase.forecast_description: Soil moisture, wind, temperature, humidity, precipitation — folded into a 0–100 Detecting Score with a verdict at the top: GO, CAUTION, or WAIT. Plus moon phase, hourly forecast, and contextual tips so you know exactly why it's a green light or a wasted trip.
showcase.offline_title: Maps that work where the bars don't
showcase.offline_description: Pre-download tile packs in any of 4 sources — Street, Satellite, Terrain, USGS Historical Topo. Pan to the area, pick the source, hit download. The map renders in the woods, on the cliff, in the basement of a permission. Your dirt, fully loaded.
showcase.nearby_title: History's closer than the satellite shows
showcase.nearby_description: Old churches, mills, battlefields, ferry crossings, abandoned schools. Every Wikipedia landmark and OpenStreetMap historic POI within range, plotted on a map with distance and bearing. Two sources, one screen, your next productive site one tap away.
showcase.presets_title: Every machine, in its real brand color
showcase.presets_description: 60+ detector models across 12 brands. Each preset card shows in its real brand color — Minelab blue, Garrett amber, XP orange, Nokta green — so spotting your machine is instant. Share settings with a buddy via QR code or JSON. Build a Custom slot if your detector isn't on the list.
showcase.permission_title: Permissions that don't live on a paper notebook
showcase.permission_description: Status colors, boundary polygons, expiry countdowns, calendar reminders, signature-ready PDF letters in two flavors (Request and Thank-You) — every landowner you've ever asked, organized. Pair the boundary with Perimeter Guard and your phone tells you when you're near a line without you ever looking down.
showcase.backup_title: One tap to your own Google Drive
showcase.backup_description: Sessions, finds, photos, videos, audio notes, presets, permissions, settings — all backed up to your Drive (not ours). Auto-backup once a day in the background. Atomic restore won't overwrite a session that's still recording. Phone dies? New device? You're back in twenty seconds.
featuresall.label: What's inside the kit
featuresall.description: Every screen exists because a detectorist needed it on a real session. Nothing here is filler.
featuresall.gps_description: Real-time satellite map with elapsed time, distance, speed, altitude, finds, heading, GPS accuracy, and max speed in one tap-to-expand HUD. Four map types: Satellite, Terrain, Street, and USGS Historical Topo. Heatmap, compass, ruler, and back-to-start line all toggle from the map sheet.
featuresall.cloud_description: One-tap backup of every session, find, photo, video, audio note, preset, and permission to your own Google Drive. Daily auto-backup runs in the background. Atomic restore won't overwrite a session that's still recording. New phone? You're back in twenty seconds.
featuresall.track_subtitle: Past sessions, layered on the live map
featuresall.track_description: Load any past session onto the live map and watch the strips you missed light up. Six cycling path colors so neighbouring tracks never blur together. Add and remove individually without ever leaving the field.
featuresall.track_bullet1: 6 path colors — Neon Green, Pink, Slate Blue, Orange, Gold, White
featuresall.track_bullet2: Add and remove tracks one at a time
featuresall.track_bullet3: Spot uncovered strips at a glance
featuresall.perimeter_description: Draw your permission boundary on the map. The phone walks you through four stages — Approaching, Near, At edge, Outside — with haptic and audio cues, so you know which one you're in without looking down. Pair with the Permission Vault and the boundary loads itself next time.
featuresall.perimeter_bullet1: Draw any polygon, drag any vertex
featuresall.perimeter_bullet3: Audio alarm the second you step outside
featuresall.measure_description: Tap the map or drop a point at your GPS position to lay out a line. Tap point 1 again to close into a polygon — perimeter and area calculated instantly in hectares or acres using real spherical geometry. Drag any vertex to edit, tap a segment to insert a point, undo and clear without ever leaving the map.
featuresall.saveguard_description: Save any measurement to the Library with a reverse-geocoded place name (no manual labels). Reopen and edit anytime. Turn the polygon you just measured into a Perimeter Guard with one tap — the measured shape becomes the haptic fence you walk inside.
featuresall.saveguard_bullet2: Reopen and edit any saved shape
featuresall.saveguard_bullet5: Audio alarm if you cross the line
featuresall.permission_description: Status colors, expiry countdowns, calendar reminders, signature-ready PDF letters in two flavors — Request and Thank-You — with your site boundary attached as Exhibit A. The thank-you letter is the secret that keeps the door open for next year.
featuresall.oldmap_description: Overlay real USGS historical topographic tiles onto your modern satellite. Old homesteads, vanished schools, demolished mills, ferry crossings — everything the satellite forgot. Slide the opacity to blend old over new, drop a pin on a hidden site, walk straight to it.
featuresall.offline_description: Pre-download tile packs in any of 4 sources — Street, Satellite, Terrain, USGS Historical Topo — for the area you're driving to. Pan, zoom, pick a source, hit download. The map renders without bars.
featuresall.plus_heading: Forty-plus little things that make a big difference
featuresall.sec_findlogger_desc: Six find types, 0–40 cm depth slider, VDI / Target ID, signal strength, seven soil types, plus name, value, weight, notes, photo, 15-second video, and an audio note. Built by a detectorist who logs.
featuresall.sec_pindrop_desc: Hot signal? One tap pins your spot at the current GPS position. Fill in depth, photo, audio, and notes later from the Finds list — never lose a target while you're still digging.
featuresall.sec_backtostart_desc: Toggle a line from your current position to your session start. The compass overlay adds a return-bearing arrow so you can walk it home.
featuresall.sec_sessioncompare_desc: Pick past sessions and compare them — overlay mode with a blend slider, or split view side by side.
featuresall.sec_presetslots_desc: Save up to 10 custom detector configurations and tap to activate. JSON import and export for sharing with friends.
featuresall.sec_export_desc: Export any session individually or in batch as GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON. Share or save to Downloads.
featuresall.sec_nightvision_desc: One-tap red monochromatic override on top of any theme. Preserves dark adaptation for dawn and dusk sessions.
featuresall.sec_compass_desc: Rotating compass dial with degrees, cardinal directions, and an optional green return-bearing arrow pointing back to your session start.
featuresall.sec_ruler_desc: 10 cm or 4 inch ruler along the screen edge with a 70-130% calibration slider so markings match your phone's real DPI.
featuresall.sec_forecast_desc: 0–100 Detecting Score with a one-word verdict at the top. Soil moisture, wind, temp, humidity, UV, pressure, hourly outlook, moon phase. Any location, any day, up to a week out.
featuresall.sec_tidetable_desc: Tide predictions from the nearest NOAA station. Pick 3, 7, or 14 day ranges. High/low times and heights grouped by day.
featuresall.sec_coincaliper_desc: On-screen measuring ring with DPI calibration. Matches against a built-in database of 130 coins across 9 regions — US, UK, Europe, Romania, Kreuzer, Asia, MEA, LATAM, Oceania.
featuresall.sec_nearbysites_desc: Historic POIs from OpenStreetMap and Wikipedia landmarks around your position. Split map + list view with distance and direct links to open them.
featuresall.sec_heatmap_desc: Rainbow density overlay of your current track. See which patches you've already covered and where the gaps are.
featuresall.sec_careerstats_desc: Filter by 1mo / 3mo / 6mo / 1yr / all-time. Sessions, finds, distance, duration, averages, personal bests, and a Top Sessions ranked list.
featuresall.sec_permissionletter_desc: Two ready-to-go templates: a Request letter to ask, and a Thank-You letter to send after the dig. Both export as signature-ready PDFs with your boundary as Exhibit A. The thank-you keeps the door open for next year.
featuresall.sec_sharecard_desc: Generate a shareable PNG session card with path preview, stats, and find breakdown.
featuresall.sec_summaryscore_desc: Animated waveform of your path, distance vs. your historical average, find-type breakdown, weather snapshot, and warm copy that actually celebrates what you did instead of just listing numbers.
featuresall.sec_colorpins_desc: Treasure (amber), Gold (yellow), Coin (blue), Relic (brown), Jewelry (magenta), Trash (grey). One glance at the map tells you what you've already pulled and what's worth a second look.
featuresall.sec_sessionmerge_desc: Select multiple sessions in the History screen and merge them into a single unified record with combined stats.
featuresall.sec_findsearch_desc: Text search across every find you've logged by name, notes, type, or session. Filter chips for all 6 find types.
featuresall.sec_elevation_desc: Per-session terrain chart with min, max, range, ascent, descent, and average elevation in meters or feet.
featuresall.sec_permitreminders_desc: Add any permission's expiry date to your phone's calendar with one tap from the Permission Vault.
featuresall.sec_photogallery_desc: Photos, videos, and audio notes from your finds in one place. Filter by type, multi-select, share, or save to Downloads.
featuresall.sec_weathersnapshot_desc: Temperature, humidity, wind, and soil moisture are captured with every session and shown on the summary and share card.
featuresall.sec_autonamed_desc: Reverse-geocoded place name on every session. No more 'Session 47.' Browse your history and the locations read like the diary they actually are.
featuresall.sec_batchactions_desc: Multi-select sessions in History to rename (40-char limit), export, merge, compare, or delete in batches.
featuresall.sec_editfinds_desc: Every field on every find is editable — type, name, depth, value, weight, notes. Audio and photo playback in the detail view.
featuresall.sec_locationsearch_desc: Search any city, address, or place name from the Forecast, Nearby Sites, and Tide screens to plan detecting trips anywhere.
featuresall.sec_onboarding_desc: First-time walkthrough: Welcome, Detect Smarter, Your Territory, Field Arsenal, and Go Premium. Skip anytime.
featuresall.sec_languages_desc: Full UI in English, Romanian, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Russian, Danish, Swedish, Turkish, and Hungarian. Switch on the fly from Settings.
featuresall.sec_unitstoggle_desc: Switch distance, speed, altitude, and depth between metric (m/km/km/h/cm) and imperial (ft/mi/mph/in) from the home screen.
featuresall.sec_colorthemes_desc: Tactical, Amber, Cobalt, Coral, Fuchsia, Slate, Navy, Operator, Monochrome, Neon Plasma, Neon Toxic, and Neon Laser — grouped into Neutral, Feminine, Masculine, and Neon palettes. 3 themes are free; the rest unlock with Pro.
featuresall.sec_detectorlib_desc: Built-in templates for 60+ detector models across 12 brands — Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus — plus a Custom slot you build yourself.
featuresall.sec_about_desc: App version, built-with credits (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Google Maps SDK, Open-Meteo, NOAA, Overpass/OSM), and the full open-source licenses page. Nothing hidden.
featuresall.sec_feedback_desc: Send a bug report or feature request straight from Settings. Six categories (UI, GPS, Functionality, Performance, Crash, Other), pre-filled email, anonymous if you want.
featuresall.sec_rankladder_desc: Eight tiers: New Explorer → Treasure Seeker → Active Detectorist → Field Veteran → Seasoned → Expert → Master → Founder. Your career, ranked, with a Founder badge for the first 1,000.
featuresall.sec_greetings_desc: 'Time for some metal magic.' 'Every dig tells a story.' Five greetings rotate so the home screen never feels canned. Small thing. Adds up.
featuresall.sec_verdict_desc: The forecast doesn't just give you a score. It gives you a one-word call: GO if conditions are right, CAUTION if mixed, WAIT if you'd waste the trip. Knows about your active permits.
featuresall.sec_moon_desc: Eight phases, computed locally, shown on the planner. Some detectorists swear by the new moon. The app doesn't judge — it just tells you which one we're in.
featuresall.sec_brandcolors_desc: Each detector preset shows in its real brand color: Minelab blue, Garrett amber, XP orange, Nokta green, Fisher purple. Spot your machine instantly.
featuresall.sec_oemrationale_desc: Xiaomi, Samsung, OnePlus, Huawei — the app knows which OEM is about to silently kill your background tracking and walks you through the exact battery setting to flip before it eats your session.
featuresall.sec_atomicrestore_desc: Restoring a backup while a session's still recording? The app stops you before you lose anything. Small thing. Saves a session. Once.
featuresall.sec_sessiontags_desc: Tag any session with one or more of eight presets — Park, Beach, Farm, Forest, Field, Historic, Private, Public. Tag once, filter forever.
featuresall.sec_signaldiary_desc: Per-find VDI, signal strength, and one of seven soil types (sandy, clay, loam, rocky, chalk, peat, gravel). Build the muscle that tells you what to dig before you dig it.
featuresall.sec_calendarreminder_desc: Drop any permission's expiry date into your phone's calendar with one tap from the Vault. Renew it before the dirt expires.
pricing.feat_measure: Measure Tool (distance + area, save, convert to guard)
pricing.feat_hud: Tactical HUD (8 fields: time, dist, speed, alt, finds, heading, accuracy, max speed)

blog.cta_card_text: has every tool a detectorist needs — GPS tracking, permissions, forecast, offline maps, and more.
